item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 2min Jason Rabbitte marking his championship debut with a cracking goal @Galway_GAA #GALvKK 0:
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 2min Jason Rabbitte marking his championship debut with a cracking goal @Galway_GAA #GALvKK 0:23 1 1 284

item.title:
CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 4min Derry took 21 shots in that half, Antrim had 8.
Derry’s 1-11 could easily have been
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 4min Derry took 21 shots in that half, Antrim had 8.
Derry’s 1-11 could easily have been 4-11. Their high press was pretty effective when they used it.
Outside of those missed goal chances, Derry have been alright I thought. Maybe feels different on TV? 1 306

item.title:
GAAPlusOfficial: GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 9min "Limerick have the Bull and @Galway_GAA have the Rabbitte!"
The Athenry teenager finds
item.description:
GAA+ @GAAPlusOfficial · 9min "Limerick have the Bull and @Galway_GAA have the Rabbitte!"
The Athenry teenager finds the net with a terrific finish, what a championship debut so far! 1 1 9 694
